name: Cybozu
description: Tokyo-listed teamwork platform behind Garoon, Kintone and Office — enterprise APIs for workflow & comms.

seo.title: Cybozu — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Cybozu: Tokyo-listed teamwork platform behind Garoon, Kintone and Office — enterprise APIs for workflow & comms.

when_to_use: Enterprise workflow automation across Garoon and kintone
Building custom business apps on top of the kintone API
Integrating Cybozu Office with external payroll systems
Approval workflow automation for Japanese enterprise teams
Cross-platform data sync between Garoon calendar and ERP

pros: Mature platform behind Kintone and Garoon
Enterprise APIs for workflow and comms
cons: UI dated compared to global peers
Pricing per-user stacks up at scale
review.verdict: The Salesforce of Japanese teamwork — indispensable domestically, nearly invisible internationally.
review.best_for: Japanese enterprises needing workflow, groupware, and custom apps in one vendor
review.not_for: Global teams or startups who value modern SaaS UX
